content.en:
Looking at the many domain ancestors, Ye Tian opened his mouth and said, "Everyone, what a precious treasure the Soul Saint Realm is, you are also very clear. For the sake of you as the ancestor of the Battle Gate Domain, each of you can enter the Soul Saint Realm to comprehend 10 million years of enlightenment! Of course, if you want to continue to enter the Soul Saint Realm to cultivate, it is not impossible, but you need to contribute! For example, if you cultivate some strong people for the Terran Race, or do some tasks issued by the Terran Race, etc., you can get some points, and you can use the points to enter the Soul Saint Realm to cultivate!"

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, are you using us to cultivate the genius of the human race?"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor frowned.

"If you don't want to, you will leave the Xuanxu Saint Realm after you have completed 10 million years of cultivation, in that case, there will be no need to cultivate geniuses for our human race!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"This ......"

Many domain ancestors glanced at each other, not knowing what to say.

Where is 10 million years enough, a soul saint realm is enough for them to comprehend tens of billions of years, and then it will gradually lose its effect, and 10 million years is just a fraction.

"I promise!"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor spoke.

Immediately, the other Supreme Domain Ancestors also agreed one by one.

After all, it's just to cultivate some Terran geniuses, or to take on some Terran tasks, these are nothing, as long as you can enter the Soul Saint Realm to cultivate, paying this price is nothing.

If it was in the Dark Sacred Realm, even if it was the Soul Saint Realm of the Battle Gate, if they wanted to enter it to cultivate, they would also need to pay some price, and if they wanted to enter the Soul Saint Realm of other forces to cultivate, they would not be able to bear the price they paid.

Therefore, Ye Tian's request was nothing at all.

Of course, there were also Supreme Domain Ancestors who were not very happy, thinking that Ye Tian's Soul Saint Realm should be subordinate to the Battle Gate.

But most of the domain ancestors agreed, and they naturally couldn't refute it.

Besides, this is not a dark holy realm, so it is not suitable to offend Ye Tian here, so he can only choose to agree.

After these domain ancestors agreed, Ye Tian signed an agreement with them, and only then did he take them into the Soul Saint Realm.

------------------

"There are so many top domain ancestors and supreme domain ancestors, and their knowledge and heritage far surpass those of the human race, if they cultivate the geniuses of the human race, the human race will inevitably give birth to that kind of real genius. After endless years, the Terran will become very powerful, and it is worth it to exchange the cultivation time of a Soul Saint Realm for the opportunity to strengthen the Terran Race!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

The 200 Supreme Domain Ancestors and many top Domain Ancestors entered the Soul Saint Realm one by one to cultivate, and began to refine their souls with the help of the Soul Saint Realm.

At the same time, the other domain ancestors of the Dark Sanctuary also came to the Dao Mountain Realm one after another.

And the purpose for them to come here is very simple, that is, the Soul Saint Realm.

However, these domain ancestors learned that the battle gate had also sent a large number of domain ancestors to come, so it was not easy to directly persecute Ye Tian.

But they wanted to enter the Soul Saint Realm to cultivate, so they looked for Ye Tian one after another.

Xuan Void Holy Realm, War Realm Void.

Some of the Domain Ancestors of the Dark Sacred Domain came here, and Ye Tian also gave them face and met the first batch of Domain Ancestors here.

The first Domain Ancestors came from a holy place, the Thousand Sacred Lands.

The Thousand Sacred Lands are powerful holy places that are enough to rank in the top twenty among the seventy-two holy lands of the Dark Sacred Domain, and it is said that it has several Superior Domain Ancestors, and its strength is quite powerful.

Among the Thousand Sacred Ancestors who came, the leader was a top Domain Ancestor and a Holy Son of the Thousand Sacred Land.

This Holy Son is also very extraordinary, it is said that he once had the level of the Unified Realm, and he was also ranked among the top 100 on the Unified Realm, and his combat power was very strong.

And now, he has become a top domain ancestor, and he has been cultivating for a long time, and he doesn't know how many supreme domain ancestors he has killed, and his reputation in the dark holy domain is also very loud.

This Holy Son is the Holy Son of Wuling!

......

"I've seen the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The Holy Son of Wuling led a group of Supreme Domain Ancestors to see Ye Tian and said very politely.

He didn't dare to underestimate Ye Tian's cultivation as an elite domain ancestor, he had already investigated Ye Tian's situation before he came.

The first in the holy war, he has mastered many holy skills, and his strength is extremely terrifying.

The Holy Endowment is already very demonic, unless they reach the level of a Superior Domain Ancestor, it is difficult for these Domain Ancestors to compete with the Holy Endowment.

And Ye Tian is not only a saint-endowed, but also a saint-endowed person with many holy gifts.

Although Ye Tian's identity was only an ordinary creature in the realm, not a descendant of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the high-level people of the Dark Sacred Domain knew very well that only the Supreme Domain Ancestor could give birth to the descendants of the Holy Endowment.

Therefore, Ye Tian's current identity, they will not take it seriously.

In their opinion, Ye Tian must be the descendants of some two peerless domain ancestors, so he didn't dare to underestimate Ye Tian, and tried not to offend if he could.

Of course, he is not afraid of Ye Tian.

As long as he didn't kill Ye Tian, he didn't believe that the Superior Domain Ancestor would not embarrass a little person like him.

In short, his purpose today is the Soul Saint Realm.

"The Holy Son of Wuling is polite, please take a seat!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

The two sat down and began to chat.

Wuling Holy Son said: "The Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws should be clear about my purpose for coming here, the Soul Saint Realm has helped me a lot, it is very difficult for ordinary domain ancestors to give birth to soul holy light, there is almost no hope, and the soul saint realm can refine the souls of our domain ancestors, which is something that cannot be done by refining the soul treasure." Therefore, we must cultivate with the help of one Soul Saint Realm. However, there are not many Soul Saint Realms in the Dark Saint Realm, and the major forces are very strict in controlling the quota of the Soul Saint Realm, and even many forces are not allowed to let outsiders cultivate the Soul Saint Realm. I am still far from being born with Soul Holy Light, and the Xuanxu Saint Realm has given birth to a Soul Saint Realm. I have to say that this Soul Saint Realm has made many forces greedy. As long as the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws allows me to enter the side of the Soul Saint Realm, I will definitely stand on the side of the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws, and if there are other forces that embarrass the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws in the future, my Holy Son of Wuling will definitely help!"

"Wuling Holy Son, you want to enter the Soul Saint Realm to practice in vain, are you thinking too much? Besides, I am the first Holy Son of the Battle Gate, do you think the Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate will not be able to protect me?"

Ye Tian sneered.

The Holy Son of Wuling knew that he wanted to fool the quota and couldn't do it, so he changed his words and said, "Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws, you say, how can I enter the Soul Saint Realm?"

Ye Tian pondered.

He knew very well that if he really rejected the Holy Son of Wuling, he would be far away from all the domain ancestors, and it would be difficult for the battle gate to protect him.

Even if you can protect him, you can't protect the human race.

The Terrans are too weak now to offend too many domain ancestors.

"In this way, if the Holy Son of Wuling builds 100,000 top-notch domains in the Dao Mountain Realm for the Terrans for free, I can give you ten places to cultivate in the Xuanxu Saint Realm for 100 million years, this should be very cost-effective, right?"

Ye Tian made a request.
